name: Mohawk Valley
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union serving NY state employees and select employer groups in the Utica and Marcy area, offering personal loans, auto loans, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Mohawk Valley Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned federal credit union headquartered in Utica, New York, with an additional branch in Marcy. The institution operates under NCUA insurance and has been serving the Mohawk Valley region for years, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional banks for eligible community members.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking and lending products. On the deposit side, they provide checking accounts, savings accounts, Christmas club accounts, and IRAs. Their lending portfolio includes personal loans, new and used auto loans, RV loans, home equity loans (closed-end), and signature loans. They also feature payroll direct deposit and mobile banking with check deposit capture functionality. Current advertised rates include auto loans as low as 4.24% for new vehicles and 3.99% for refinancing.

What distinguishes Mohawk Valley FCU is its restricted membership model based on employer affiliation and geographic location. Members must be employees or retirees of New York State agencies in specific counties, SUNY POLY/SUNY Morrisville staff, Town/Village of Marcy or New Hartford employees, or staff of named private employers (Moody's Polaris, Inserra's Flooring). This membership structure allows them to serve a defined community with personalized service. The credit union emphasizes member-first philosophy, lower fees than traditional banks, and willingness to work with members to refinance or modify existing loans.

The primary limitation for most consumers is eligibility—membership is restricted and cannot be opened by the general public. For those who qualify, Mohawk Valley FCU provides solid, locally-focused credit union services with competitive rates and a commitment to member relationships over profit maximization. Their two branch locations limit accessibility compared to larger institutions, though they offer online banking and mobile deposit options.
services: Mobile banking with mobile check deposit
pros: Restricted membership model ensures focus on defined community served by the credit union
Advertised auto loan rates as low as 3.99% for refinancing and 4.24% for new vehicles
Not-for-profit structure allows better rates and lower fees compared to traditional banks
Willingness to modify and refinance existing loans to better rates for current members
Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit capture available
Co-Op network provides fee-free ATM access across shared branching system
NCUA insurance protects deposits, with routing number 221380651
cons: Membership is restricted and requires employment or family affiliation with eligible organizations—not open to general public
Only two physical branch locations (Utica and Marcy, NY) limits accessibility
Limited geographic footprint to Mohawk Valley region; online banking options not emphasized as extensively as larger institutions
No information provided about loan application processing times or approval rates
Website does not specify APR ranges, only promotional low-end rates
best_for: New York state employees in Fulton, Hamilton, Herkimer, Madison, Montgomery, and Oneida Counties seeking lower-fee banking
SUNY POLY and SUNY Morrisville employees and their families wanting member-focused lending
Town/Village of Marcy and New Hartford employees needing personalized loan modification and refinancing services
Employees of Moody's Polaris and Inserra's Flooring who qualify for membership and want credit union benefits
diagnosis: Mohawk Valley FCU is best for employees and family members of eligible New York state agencies and select employers in the Mohawk Valley region who seek competitive credit union rates and personalized member service. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted by employment affiliation and geographic service area; most consumers cannot open an account unless they meet specific eligibility criteria.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Mohawk Valley — Credit Union in MARCY, NY | CreditDoc
meta_description: Mohawk Valley — NCUA-insured credit union in MARCY, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
